name: Search/custom-search-param
description: Custom SearchParameter registration conformance tests ported from fhir-server's CustomSearchParamTests.cs. Covers rejection of syntactically/structurally invalid SearchParameter definitions (bad FHIRPath expression syntax, an expression referencing a non-existent property, an invalid base resource type, an invalid search parameter type, a missing base, a missing expression, a missing type, and a type that is incompatible with the expression's target — e.g. 'quantity' on a reference-valued expression) with HTTP 400 Bad Request plus an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue. Also covers a Microsoft FHIR Server-specific implementation limit (SearchParameter.url capped at 128 characters on both create and update) as warningOnly, since that specific length cap is not a universal FHIR R4 requirement. All fixtures are PUT via 'update' with client-supplied ids so a known, static id can always be torn down afterwards regardless of whether the create/update attempt succeeded or was rejected.

resource.name: Fhir262BadSyntax
resource.description: Invalid: expression is not valid FHIRPath syntax.

resource.name: Fhir262WrongProperty
resource.description: Invalid: expression references a property ('foo') that does not exist on Encounter.diagnosis.

resource.name: Fhir262InvalidBase
resource.description: Invalid: base contains 'foo', which is not a valid resource type.

resource.name: Fhir262InvalidType
resource.description: Invalid: type is 'foo', which is not a valid SearchParamType.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingBase
resource.description: Invalid: base is empty, but base has cardinality 1..*.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingExpression
resource.description: Invalid: expression is an empty string.

resource.name: Fhir262MissingType
resource.description: Invalid: type is an empty string, but type has cardinality 1..1.

resource.name: Fhir262UnsupportedType
resource.description: Invalid: type is 'quantity', but the expression (Encounter.diagnosis.condition) resolves to a reference, not a quantity.

resource.name: Fhir262UrlTooLong
resource.description: MS FHIR Server-specific: url is 129 characters, one over the implementation's 128-character cap.

resource.name: Fhir262UrlValid
resource.description: Valid: url is exactly 128 characters (at the MS FHIR Server implementation cap, not over it).

resource.name: Fhir262UrlValid
resource.description: Same resource id as sp-url-valid, but url has been changed to 129 characters — used to PUT-update an existing, previously-valid SearchParameter to an over-the-cap url.

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: bad FHIRPath expression syntax is rejected
test.description: A SearchParameter whose expression is not valid FHIRPath ('bad syntax') must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-badsyntax (bad FHIRPath syntax)

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the invalid search parameter definition (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: expression references a non-existent property
test.description: A SearchParameter whose expression is Encounter.diagnosis.foo ('foo' does not exist on Encounter.diagnosis) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-wrongproperty (Encounter.diagnosis.foo)

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention Encounter.diagnosis.foo (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: invalid base resource type
test.description: A SearchParameter with base=['foo'] ('foo' is not a valid resource type) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-invalidbase (base=['foo'])

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention 'foo' is not a valid resource type (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: invalid search parameter type
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='foo' ('foo' is not a valid SearchParamType) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-invalidtype (type='foo')

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention 'foo' is not a valid SearchParamType (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing base (empty array)
test.description: A SearchParameter with base=[] (base has cardinality 1..*) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-missingbase (base=[])

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention cardinality (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing expression (empty string)
test.description: A SearchParameter with expression='' must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-missingexpression (expression='')

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the expression is not supported (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: missing type (empty string)
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='' (type has cardinality 1..1) must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-missingtype (type='')

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention cardinality (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: invalid SearchParameter: type incompatible with the expression's target (unsupported type)
test.description: A SearchParameter with type='quantity' but an expression (Encounter.diagnosis.condition) that resolves to a reference, not a quantity, must be rejected with HTTP 400 and an OperationOutcome error/fatal issue.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-unsupportedtype (type='quantity' on a reference expression)

assert.description: Must return HTTP 400 Bad Request
Response body must be an OperationOutcome
OperationOutcome must contain an error or fatal issue
Diagnostics should mention the type is not supported (warningOnly: exact wording is MS FHIR Server-specific)

test.name: SearchParameter.url longer than 128 characters is rejected on create (MS FHIR Server-specific)
test.description: MS FHIR Server enforces an implementation-specific 128-character cap on SearchParameter.url. A 129-character url is expected to be rejected with HTTP 400, but this cap is not a universal FHIR R4 requirement, so the whole scenario is warningOnly.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-urltoolong (url is 129 characters)

assert.description: Should return HTTP 400 Bad Request (warningOnly: the 128-character url cap is an MS FHIR Server-specific implementation limit, not a universal FHIR R4 requirement)

test.name: an existing SearchParameter cannot be updated to a url longer than 128 characters (MS FHIR Server-specific)
test.description: A SearchParameter is first created with a 128-character url (at, not over, the MS FHIR Server cap), then an update attempt changes its url to 129 characters. The initial create and the subsequent rejection are both warningOnly, since custom SearchParameter registration and the 128-character cap are both MS FHIR Server-specific behaviors, not universal FHIR R4 requirements.

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-urlupdate (url is exactly 128 characters)

assert.description: Should return HTTP 201 Created (warningOnly: custom SearchParameter registration support varies across servers)

operation.description: PUT SearchParameter/fhir262-sp-urlupdate again, this time with a 129-character url

assert.description: Should return HTTP 400 Bad Request (warningOnly: the 128-character url cap is an MS FHIR Server-specific implementation limit, not a universal FHIR R4 requirement)

operation.description: Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-badsyntax (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-wrongproperty (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-invalidbase (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-invalidtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-missingbase (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-missingexpression (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-missingtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-unsupportedtype (expected to be a no-op; the create should have been rejected)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-urltoolong (only present if this server does not enforce the 128-character url cap)
Teardown: delete fhir262-sp-urlupdate (only present if this server supports custom SearchParameter registration)
